ageVerification.welcomeTagline: Find your next favorite Roblox game!

tutorial.slide1Text: Discover amazing games you'll love - let's get started!
tutorial.slide2Text: Not for you? Tap X. Love it? Tap the heart!
tutorial.slide3Text: Tap + to save games you want to play later!
tutorial.slide4Text: The more you play, the better we get at finding games you'll love!
tutorial.slide5Text: Open your mystery box every day for a cool new game!
tutorial.slide6Text: Add games to your to-do list and earn XP when you try them!
tutorial.slide7Text: Earn cool badges and level up as you discover games!

premium.title: PlayBeacon Premium
premium.subtitle:
Remove all ads forever with a single purchase.
No subscriptions. No recurring charges.
premium.featureNoAdsDesc: Remove all banner and video ads permanently
premium.purchaseNote:
This is a one-time purchase.
No recurring charges will be made.
premium.successText:
Thank you for supporting PlayBeacon!
All ads have been removed from your experience.
premium.devModeNotice:
In-app purchases are not available in development mode.
Build with EAS to test purchases.
